description: Erection quality and inspection knowledge — bolt tension verification, structural weld inspection, alignment and plumbness tolerances, base plate and grouting inspection, coating inspection, and as-built documentation.

turn_of_nut_inspection.method: After snug-tight, verify rotation marks show correct additional turn. Crayon or paint mark on nut and steel before turning.
turn_of_nut_inspection.inspection_rate: 10% of bolts in each connection minimum. All bolts in slip-critical connections.
turn_of_nut_inspection.rejection: If any bolt in sample fails, inspect all bolts in that connection.

TC_bolt_inspection.method: Visual — verify spline has sheared off on every TC bolt.
TC_bolt_inspection.unshearedspline: Bolt is NOT tensioned. Must be replaced or retightened until spline shears.
TC_bolt_inspection.inspection_rate: 100% visual — every TC bolt must have sheared spline.

DTI_inspection.method: Insert 0.005 inch feeler gauge into DTI gaps. Count how many gaps refuse the gauge.
DTI_inspection.acceptance: Minimum number of gaps refusing gauge depends on bolt diameter. Typically: 3/4 inch bolt = 3 of 4 gaps refuse, 7/8 inch = 3 of 5, 1 inch = 4 of 6.

Skidmore_Wilhelm.description: Bolt tension calibrator. Measures actual tension (kips) produced by the installation method.
Skidmore_Wilhelm.use: Calibrate torque wrenches. Verify bolt lot characteristics. Daily calibration for calibrated wrench method.
Skidmore_Wilhelm.procedure: Install representative bolt from the lot into Skidmore. Apply torque or turns. Read tension. Compare to RCSC Table for minimum tension.
Skidmore_Wilhelm.record: Log bolt lot number, manufacturer, date, calibration results. Required documentation.

common_issues.under_tensioned: Most common problem. Cause: insufficient turns, worn TC wrench, wrong torque value, friction variation.
common_issues.over_tensioned: Can break bolt or strip threads. More common with A490 (more brittle). Watch for thread deformation.
common_issues.missing_washers: Hardened washer required under turned element (nut or bolt head). Without washer, nut digs into steel surface and galls.
common_issues.wrong_bolt_length: Bolt too short: insufficient thread engagement. Bolt too long: nut bottoms on thread runout. Verify 2-3 threads show past nut.

visual_VT.performed_on: ALL structural welds. 100% visual inspection required by AWS D1.1.

acceptance_criteria.cracks: NONE permitted. Any crack is reject.
acceptance_criteria.undercut: 1/32 inch max for primary members. 1/16 inch max for secondary members.
acceptance_criteria.porosity: Sum of visible porosity diameter shall not exceed 3/8 inch in any linear inch or 3/4 inch in any 12 inches.
acceptance_criteria.fillet_weld_size: Shall meet or exceed specified size. Undersize by more than 1/16 inch = reject.
acceptance_criteria.fillet_weld_profile: Shall be convex or flat. Excessively concave fillet = reject (throat is undersize).
acceptance_criteria.overlap: Not permitted. Weld metal rolling over base metal without fusion.
acceptance_criteria.arc_strikes: Not permitted on primary tension members. Grind smooth on other members.

visual_VT.tools: Fillet weld gauge (set of gauges or multi-gauge), flashlight, magnifying glass (10x for cracks), AWS weld gauge.

ultrasonic_UT.performed_on: Complete Joint Penetration (CJP) welds — typically beam flange-to-column moment connections.
ultrasonic_UT.standard: AWS D1.1 Chapter 6 Part F. Acceptance criteria based on indication rating vs rejection level.
ultrasonic_UT.inspector_qualification: AWS CWI (Certified Welding Inspector) for visual. ASNT Level II for UT.
ultrasonic_UT.timing: UT inspection after 48 hours for A36/A992 steel (to allow delayed hydrogen cracking to develop, if any). Immediate UT acceptable for preheat-controlled joints.

magnetic_particle_MT.performed_on: Fillet welds, partial penetration welds, and base metal when specified.
magnetic_particle_MT.use: Detects surface and near-surface cracks, particularly in fillet weld toes and HAZ.
magnetic_particle_MT.method: Yoke method (AC or DC electromagnetic yoke). Apply magnetic particles (dry or wet fluorescent). Crack interrupts magnetic field and particles cluster at crack.

dye_penetrant_PT.performed_on: Non-magnetic materials (stainless steel, aluminum) or where MT is not practical.
dye_penetrant_PT.procedure: Clean surface, apply penetrant, dwell time (10-30 minutes), remove excess, apply developer, inspect for indications.
dye_penetrant_PT.limitation: Surface must be clean and dry. Cannot detect subsurface defects. Temperature-sensitive (40-125F).

column_plumbness.individual_column: 1/500 of column height. Maximum 1 inch toward building exterior, 2 inches total.
column_plumbness.column_to_column: Variation from plumb between adjacent columns: 1/500 of distance between columns.
column_plumbness.measurement: Transit, total station, or laser plumb. Measure at column top. Reference to baseline at column base.

beam_elevation.tolerance: +/- 3/8 inch from theoretical elevation for members up to 20 feet above base.
beam_elevation.additional: Plus 1/16 inch for each additional 10 feet of elevation.
beam_elevation.measurement: Level survey from benchmark. Measure at each end and midspan.

beam_sweep.tolerance: Lateral offset from straight: 1/8 inch per 10 feet of beam length. Maximum 1/2 inch.
beam_sweep.measurement: String line or laser along beam flange.

anchor_bolt_position.tolerance: +/- 1/4 inch from design location in plan.
anchor_bolt_position.elevation: +/- 1/2 inch from design projection above concrete.
anchor_bolt_position.CRITICAL: Measure anchor bolt pattern BEFORE concrete sets. After concrete is set, you cannot move them. Template is essential.

before_pour.concrete_surface: Roughened (chipped or sandblasted), clean, free of oil/grease/laitance. Saturated surface dry (SSD).
before_pour.forms: Leak-proof. Waxed plywood or steel. No gaps — epoxy grout will find and leak through any gap.
before_pour.baseplate_preparation: Bottom of baseplate clean, free of mill scale, paint, oil. Some specs require blast cleaning.
before_pour.temperature: Concrete and baseplate between 40F and 90F for epoxy grout. Grout materials conditioned to same range.
before_pour.anchor_bolts: Protected from grout (wrap with tape or foam). Anchor bolt holes in baseplate protected.

during_pour.mixing: Per manufacturer instructions. Correct ratio of resin, hardener, aggregate. Timed mixing sequence.
during_pour.pour_technique: Pour from one side only. Grout must flow under baseplate to opposite side. No trapped air.
during_pour.verification: Grout should come up through vent holes on opposite side. If not, void exists — continue pouring.
during_pour.pot_life: Monitor pot life — do not use grout past its working time. In hot weather, pot life can be as short as 15 minutes.

after_cure.cure_time: Per manufacturer. Typically 24-72 hours to full cure depending on temperature.
after_cure.tap_test: Tap grout and baseplate with hammer. Solid sound = good bond. Hollow = void. Mark and repair voids.
after_cure.anchor_bolt_torque: After grout is fully cured, torque anchor bolts to specification. Re-check baseplate level after torquing.
after_cure.documentation: Record: grout product, lot number, mix date/time, ambient temperature, grout temperature, pour start/finish time, cure start time, tap test results, anchor bolt torque values.

surface_preparation.verification: Visual comparison to SSPC/NACE standards (photographic comparators). SP6 = commercial, SP10 = near-white, SP5 = white metal.
surface_preparation.profile: Measure anchor profile depth with Testex tape or profilometer. Typically 1.5-3.0 mils for most coating systems.
surface_preparation.cleanliness: No dust, oil, moisture, or blast debris on surface before coating. Salt contamination test (Bresle patch) for critical applications.

DFT_measurement.wet_film: Measure during application with wet film gauge (notched gauge). Allows immediate correction.
DFT_measurement.dry_film: Measure after cure with magnetic gauge (Positector, Elcometer) for steel substrates.
DFT_measurement.spot_measurements: Minimum 3 measurements per area. Average must meet spec. No single reading below 80% of specified minimum.
DFT_measurement.each_coat: Measure DFT after EACH coat — primer, intermediate, finish. Cannot verify primer thickness after topcoat is applied.

adhesion_testing.cross_hatch: ASTM D3359. Cut X-pattern, apply tape, pull tape. Rate adhesion on 0-5 scale. 4B or 5B = acceptable.
adhesion_testing.pull_off: ASTM D4541. Glue dolly to coating, pull with calibrated adhesion tester. Minimum pull-off value per spec (typically 200-500 psi).

coating_inspection.field_touch_up: After erection, all bolted connections, field welds, and damage must be touch-up coated. Match existing system. Surface prep (power tool cleaning SSPC SP11 minimum) required before touch-up.
